_comment: UniversalRouter RouterParameters for Gnosis Chain (100), V3-only. Field names follow the modern universal-router RouterParameters struct; copy into the struct fields present in your chosen tag. Zero address / zero hash where a protocol is not deployed on Gnosis (V2, V4).

_notes.weth9: WXDAI — the wrapped native token on Gnosis
_notes.poolInitCodeHash: standard Uniswap V3 pool init code hash (same across canonical V3 deployments)
_notes.v2: Gnosis has no Uniswap V2; leave v2Factory zero and pairInitCodeHash zero
_notes.v4: Gnosis has no Uniswap V4 yet; leave v4 fields zero
